# 📘 Add Developer Setup Documentation

Create a `docs/how-to-develop.md` or similar to guide future contributors.

Include:

- How to install dependencies (`pip install -r requirements.txt`).
- MongoDB setup and how `init_database()` works.
- Running the FastAPI server and where the static files live.
- Any Copilot-specific instructions if relevant.

Good docs lower the barrier for new students and maintainers.
